info.title: Chatwork API
info.description: Chatwork REST API v2 provides access to Chatwork messaging platform features including rooms, messages, tasks, files, and contacts.

post.summary: Create a new group chat room
post.description: Create a new group chat room

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Set to 1 to force get all unread messages

post.summary: Post a message to a room

self_unread.description: Set to 1 to make the message unread for yourself

post.description: Post a message to a room

message_id.description: Mark all messages up to this message as read
Mark all messages after this message as unread

get.summary: Get task list in a room (max 100)
get.description: Get task list in a room (max 100)

post.summary: Create a task in a room
post.description: Create a task in a room

get.summary: Get file list in a room (max 100)
get.description: Get file list in a room (max 100)

post.description: Upload a file to a room

parameters.name: create_download_url
parameters.description: Set to 1 to create a download URL

members_admin_ids.description: Comma-separated account IDs for admin members

members_member_ids.description: Comma-separated account IDs for normal members

members_readonly_ids.description: Comma-separated account IDs for read-only members
